Beginning at an iron pipe at the northeasterly corner of the property herein conveyed; thence S 03°15'30" E, 145.20 feet; thence S 18°44'12" E, 132.50 feet; thence S 22°15'48" E, 98.75 feet; thence S 35°00'00" E, 167.30 feet; thence S 42°30'45" E, 110.00 feet; thence S 50°15'30" E, 95.50 feet; thence S 62°00'00" E, 88.75 feet; thence S 89°45'00" W, 250.00 feet; thence N 60°15'00" W, 175.50 feet; thence N 45°30'00" W, 165.20 feet; thence N 30°15'00" W, 145.80 feet; thence N 15°00'00" W, 120.45 feet; thence N 05°30'00" W, 110.10 feet; thence N 12°45'00" E, 95.25 feet; thence N 25°30'00" E, 85.40 feet; thence N 40°15'00" E, 102.30 feet; thence N 55°00'00" E, 95.60 feet; thence N 65°30'00" E, 75.20 feet to the point of beginning.
